typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-none
typography.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-none

components.button_primary: bg-[#C87A63] text-white hover:bg-[#B3664F] px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-colors duration-200
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-[#2A2A2A] border border-[#2A2A2A] hover:bg-[#2A2A2A] hover:text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-colors duration-200
components.button_glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-md text-[#2A2A2A] hover:bg-white/90 px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-colors duration-200 shadow-sm
components.card: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E8E2D9] transition-transform duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1
components.input: w-full bg-white border border-[#E8E2D9] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C87A63] focus:border-transparent transition-all
components.header: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E8E2D9] transition-all duration-300

hero_background.description: Black backwash chairs with sinks placed in modern spacious beauty salon with window and arrangement of cosmetology supply on shelves

hero_alternative.description: a row of black and white chairs next to a sink

bridal_service.description: Stunning portrait of a woman in traditional Indian bridal attire with intricate jewelry.

hair_spa_service.description: a woman getting her hair cut by a hair stylist

nail_service.description: Manicure and pedicure tools on a blue towel.

owner_portrait.description: a woman wearing glasses and a black and white checkered shirt

gallery_1.description: smiling woman in brown top holding hairs

gallery_2.description: Black and white portrait of a smiling bride adorned in traditional jewelry.

instructions_to_main_agent.layout_architecture: Use a mobile-first approach. Ensure the 'Book Now' button is sticky or highly visible on mobile. Use bento grids for the gallery and services sections to break the typical row-column monotony.
instructions_to_main_agent.typography: Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for elegant, oversized headings. Use 'Outfit' for readable body text. Ensure all headings have tight tracking (tracking-tight) to feel premium.
instructions_to_main_agent.colors_and_surfaces: Avoid pure white for the background; use the warm linen '#FAF8F5'. Use the Terracotta primary color strategically for CTAs. Implement crystal glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl) for the sticky header so it blends seamlessly when scrolling over images.
instructions_to_main_agent.interactions: Add smooth scroll using Lenis or Framer Motion for section reveals. Hover states on cards should have a subtle lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow increase. Provide clear visual feedback when interacting with the booking form.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: Ensure ALL interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, links, tabs) have a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='book-appointment-button').
instructions_to_main_agent.features_to_implement: 1. Hero Section with clear CTA and Google Rating (5.0 / 161 reviews). 2. Services Showcase grouped by categories (Hair, Color, Bridal, etc.). 3. Online Booking System with date/time and service selection. 4. Gallery Section. 5. About Megha section using the owner_portrait image. 6. Reviews section. 7. Contact section with map embed and WhatsApp sticky button. 8. Admin Dashboard for managing bookings and services.
instructions_to_main_agent.component_libraries: Use Shadcn UI for complex interactive components (Booking form, Datepicker, Select, Dialogs, Admin Tables). Customize them to match the Organic & Earthy aesthetic (rounded borders, warm colors, no generic gray borders).
